why_not_fixed_now: Tool breakage containment is policy-locked but not yet proven as a dedicated physical governed event plus NCR linkage chain
required_source_or_decision: Implement breakage event object with genealogy and NCR/inspection triggers

why_not_fixed_now: Gage calibration and MSA are linked conceptually but still spread across calibration links and GRR study lanes

acceptance_criterion: CTQ measurements require valid gage calibration and acceptable MSA in one governed chain

why_not_fixed_now: Machine/material/operation compatibility for tools is still partially implicit in metadata and engineering requirement links
